betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§4[warn]Ore generation in NT:NH has been changed.[/warn]

§fОre is now generated in a more realistic manner in veins and strata. It is also distributed across biomes and in order to get a specific ore, you will have to travel. For more information on which biomes, at what altitude, and how often ore is found, see the table below.
